scale.4: Handled rigorously with traceable evidence and actionable next steps

dimensions.description: Correctly identifies mode, lifecycle stage, user, and current decision.
Accepts an artifact request while checking or researching the evidence needed to make it credible.
Separates facts, signals, commitments, hypotheses, recommendations, unknowns, and contradictions.
Tests the developer problem, audience, alternatives, and realistic use cases rather than assuming the proposed API is the answer.
Assesses developer evidence and survey fitness, sampling, interpretation, limitations, and traceability.
Distinguishes interest, trial willingness, ship commitment, and production use; proposes appropriate validation.
Handles standards maturity, other-engine positions, Baseline expectations, compatibility, and progressive enhancement without converting silence into support.
Examines frameworks, libraries, tools, servers, deployment, business workflow, and production constraints.
Connects features upward to developer jobs and platform narratives, and narratives downward to capabilities and evidence.
Chooses research, tooling, content, partners, events, GDEs, diagnostics, or support tactics according to the actual bottleneck.
Produces mutually consistent, audience-specific, reusable assets with owners, sources, status, and unresolved assumptions.
Defines relevant outcomes, denominators, leading/lagging indicators, data limitations, and feedback loops.
Finds materially affected constituencies based on the capability and power change rather than using a fixed or politically convenient list.
Uses dated primary sources, separates recorded positions from inference, and presents the strongest recognizable version of concerns.
Analyzes user agency, hostile/dominant-site use, market power, conflicts of interest, costs, and incentives that can defeat safeguards.
Maps concerns to evidence, design changes, mitigations, outreach, tests, narrower scope, delay, rollback, abandonment, or explicit accepted risk.
Separates developer/implementer value from end-user benefit and tests resource costs, consent/control, low-end configurations, accessibility, failure, fallback, hostile use, and reversibility.
Exercises realistic end-to-end paths with reproducible environment, expected/actual behavior, console/network/visual/accessibility/performance evidence, ownership, and exact denominators.
Preserves legitimate criticism while preparing roles, moderation, privacy, harassment/doxxing/threat escalation, disengagement, staff support, and aftercare.
Maintains inventory, provenance, stable history, questions, goals, validation, monitoring cadence/triggers, owners, outcomes, and human escalation across iterations.
Diagnoses the current lifecycle stage and assembles a decision-quality handoff of evidence, risks, artifacts, questions, owners, learning goals and conditions for the next phase.
Searches varied independent source families, communities, regions and problem language; deduplicates evidence; assesses quality/bias; and states saturation, gaps and cutoff.
Maps segments, jobs, workarounds, costs, constraints, candidates and decision roles while preserving consent and the distinction from interest, commitment and production.
Extracts jobs, primitives, lifecycle, controls, costs and friction from native, mini-app, chat, LLM/agent or other ecosystems and evaluates what fits web principles rather than copying APIs.
Actively tests why the feature should not exist, should use another layer, should narrow/change, or lacks sufficient demand; retains contradictions in conclusions.
Uses an authoritative fixed inventory, one report per feature with all launch events, complete phase replay, retained partial/blocked targets, and exact denominators.
Assesses developer value, user impact, adoption, interoperability, implementation, communication and support separately with cited evidence and limitations rather than simplistic success labels.
Uses cached primary evidence, bounded independent jobs, retries/backoff, atomic outputs, provider fallback, explicit statuses, validation and safe resume without losing the denominator.
Does not imply that DevRel advice replaces formal review or creates a shipment veto.
Respects the evidence boundary and never leaks private material into public output.

criticalFailures: Fabricates a source, metric, quotation, developer signal, partner commitment, browser position, approval, or test result
Presents unknown, absent, or no-response evidence as positive support
Leaks or requests publication of private material without explicit approval
Claims DevRel approval replaces a formal launch or review requirement
Generates a launch-ready artifact containing material unsupported claims without labeling them
